appraisal_events.evidence: « Ce sera le chien de Mme Sazerat, » disait Françoise... — « Comme si je ne connaissais pas le chien de Mme Sazerat ! » répondait ma tante...
appraisal_events.explanation: Françoise offers a calming hypothesis to appease the aunt, who brusquely dismisses it by asserting her own superior knowledge, locally undercutting Françoise in the exchange.

status_effects.explanation: Her attempt to settle the matter is rejected with a cutting retort, weakening her footing in the conversation.
